name: stallari-blade-mcp
title: Stallari Vault
description: Obsidian vault operations via Swift MCP — read, write, search, properties, graph analysis, lens semantic tools
author: groupthink-dev

setup.help_text: No credentials required. Stallari Blade connects directly to your local Obsidian vault via the filesystem. Ensure the vault path is configured in Stallari settings.
setup.blurb: Obsidian vault operations via Swift MCP — read, write, search, properties, graph analysis, lens semantic tools

notes: Vault tools from stallari-blade (29 tools) + lens tools from stallari-lens (11 tools). Both map to the vault service via the vault-v1 contract. Library form factor (DD-265) — compiled into the Stallari daemon via SPM dep on stallari-vault; no separate install path. Vault is always-on so no consent_tile_link is set; marketplace renders a passive Bundled tile.
